sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; prob. to call, to call together (kindred to the root קֹול).

Hiphil, to call together, to assemble people, Num 8:9 10:7 20:8 judgment, Job 11:10.

Niphal, to be gathered together, to assemble selves (as people), Num 16:3, etc.

Derivatives, מַקְהֵלִים, מַקְהֵלֹות and the four nouns which follow.
